event: View of Civita Castellana with Aqueduct
description: A panoramic landscape painting showing a tall multi-arched aqueduct or bridge spanning a deep rocky gorge. The structure connects two cliff sides covered with lush vegetation. In the background, a conical mountain rises against a golden sky. The foreground is richly detailed with trees and rocky outcrops. Warm golden-orange light bathes the entire scene, suggesting late afternoon. The composition emphasizes the dramatic depth of the gorge and the engineering grandeur of the bridge.
